{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323145806A118F2DCD3E08D01AA2D"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617754907506230078","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还行 ，保护姐姐，救人类。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773648699,"group_id":"7614422482958699544","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxTUGGXcMQLmNU/oRRSF2Tw0FGMGN3rFFT8l0GUZen3o","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/01c178c6ab3f421ebf393e80d96fd801~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795573&x-signature=exZ%2BTLfY3vPuXSYJSB5joq1btp0%3D","user_id":"1095577762791704","user_name":"一笑而过yy"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1095577762791704","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7614422482958699544","book_info":{"abstract":"全球异变，大折叠时代降临，异兽横行。
江渡在觉醒仪式上，觉醒了全校公认的最坑爹C级异能【抢劫】。
击杀目标后，仅有1%的极低概率掠夺对方异能，且最要命的是——终生只能触发一次！
所有人都嘲笑他这辈子只能去后勤打杂。
直到那天夜里，江渡一刀捅死了一个觉醒了A级【刷新】的恶霸。
【1%极低概率触发成功！获得A级异能：刷新！】
【刷新：消耗体力和精神力，瞬间清除身体一切负面状态！】
当江渡对自己使用了一次“刷新”后，异能法则的底层逻辑被他彻底卡死——
“终生仅限一次”的限制，竟然被判定为技能冷却的负面状态，直接清零重置！
看着脑海里重新亮起的【抢劫】光芒，江渡露出了极其疯狂的冷笑。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/dbfb94f3a4a749ea6b74df4fd9880426~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"刺猬尺恩","author_id":"","book_id":"7614422482958699544","book_name":"觉醒C级异能？我靠刷新无限抢劫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7614435478356951576","read_count":"543","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"128397"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"54","tags":"都市高武,都市异能,多女主,末世,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dbfb94f3a4a749ea6b74df4fd9880426~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433086&x-signature=fiEtLzQ6vFa%2Bxz0fCw9sapcOSfU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3558481434521671","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"53"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323145806A118F2DCD3E08D01AA2D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8577,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":
